env_files.role: Original EPA public agency report used as the main long-document source
env_files.license_note: U.S. Environmental Protection Agency public report; preserve citation and do not imply EPA endorsement of generated benchmark content.
env_files.text_extract_check: 101 pages; first 12 pages alone extract approximately 26,319 characters; title, executive summary, key findings, scope, and limitations extractable.

env_files.role: Natural reading-route note for the long EPA report; does not list final evidence-card answers
env_files.license_note: Derived from EPA public report reading route; original PDF is retained in env.
env_files.whether_original_or_adapted: reading-route note derived from source report, not a replacement for the original PDF

source_policy.web_usage_note: Closed-env case: solve only from cached env files and task.md; do not use the web.

notes: The original 101-page EPA PDF remains the main source. source_excerpt.md was weakened to a reading route so the agent must inspect and select from the long document. expected_facts uses a candidate finding pool; the image should show exactly three supported evidence cards.
